evals.expected_output: docs/product/backlog.md amended in place with a planning-ready verdict.
assertions: Applies remove, split, prioritise, re-estimate in that order
Records a reason for every removal or deferral
Returns a verdict of Ready / Ready with amendments / Not ready
Does not create new epics from a spec

evals.expected_output: Verdict against the tasks.md sprint-ready checklist, with amendments applied where unambiguous.
assertions: Checks story statements, independent test criteria and observable Then clauses
Checks for dependency cycles and missing estimates
Does not change any task ID
